description:
Inline compiler-generated single-use CPS continuation functions (k_N) back into their callers. Replaces TailCall with Goto, optionally converts the cont site's Term::Call to TailCall.

Guards: closure target, multi-site, back-edge TailCalled, self-referential, Receive-containing.

## Acceptance
- alias.clif golden: two print calls inlined into main, no k_N functions.
- All existing tests pass.
